case_title: SUSAN WOLFF VS. JENNIFER BENORDEN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-06-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT JENNIFER BENORDEN. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55.00 SERVICE FEE) SERVED AUG-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, JENNIFER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POPICHAK, LACEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JENNIFER BENORDEN ONLY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR OTHER NAMED DEFENDANTS WHO ARE NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LACEY POPICHAK, AND MARGIE MAUCK BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-06-2010 AT 5:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLFF, SUSAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BENORDEN, JENNIFER DEFENDANT LACEY POPICHAK AND MARGIE MAUCK DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,751.30 FILED BY WOLFF, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT BENORDEN, JENNIFER POPICHAK, LACEY MAUCK, MARGIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO, DEFT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOLFF, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT MAUCK, MARGIE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
